Wait, but according to the mutant failing tests information, all the TestDateTimeZoneCutover tests are still failing, meaning their statuses didn't change after this mutation. That suggests that perhaps these tests weren't directly affected by the removal of BET because they might be relying on other timezones that were not altered in this particular mutation.

However, another angle is to consider if any tests were indirectly affected due to changes elsewhere. But since only one test's status changed (to passing), it seems isolated to TestMonthDay_Properties.

Putting it all together: The mutant at line 231 removes the mapping for BET timezone.
